subtask: Move grab_wrist gripper to directly above the tube and grab the tube
Pick up the tube with grab_wrist gripper and move to the center of the tray
Move attach_wrist gripper to the grab_wrist, grab the tube with attach_wrist gripper, open grab_wrist gripper
Move the tube under the insertion hole with attch_wrist gripper
Moves attach_wrist gripper upward to insert the tube into the insertion hole
